name: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh

hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 4.79 km from property

contentSummary.displayName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
contentSummary.defaultName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
contentSummary.localeName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh

address.address1: Jl. Teuku Nyak Arief, Lamgugob, Lamnyong

nearbyPlaces.name: RF Dental Clinic& Lab -1 praktek dokter Gigi

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The price is indeed cheap, but it's not that terrible and bad, the facilities are very poor, the sheets and pillowcases are very dirty.
comments.originalComment: memang harga murah, tapi gak sejorok dan seburuk itu juga, fasilitas sangat parah, sprei dan sarung bantal sangat joron

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
1. The small bathroom is crazy, it's even bigger than this bathroom of yours. How could the water run out like this!?
2. The bedroom is also not hygienic, the walls are dirty, it makes me not want to sleep.
3. The service is lacking, we ordered on the app but when we arrived they said it's not available. Luckily they replaced it in another room.
4. Deposit, actually it's okay to use a deposit, but with this kind of quality? Just be honest!
comments.originalComment:
1. KAMAR MANDI KECIL GILA, lagi besar TPS daripada ni kamar mandi lo. Pun macamana bole hotek mati air!?
2. Kamar tidur juga tak higenis, dinding kotor, buat tak selera nak tidor
3. Pelayanan kurang, kita dah pesan kat app tapi bila datang kata tak available. Nasib baik diganti kat kamar lain.
4. Deposit, sebenarnya tak apa guna deposit, but with kualitas acem ni? Yang betol je lah!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
It was also important for the hotel manager to be transparent and honest in advance, not to make excuses for electricity black out then to charge extra RP50.000 on top what I had paid via AGODA.

There was also no water supply in the morning of that day, which was terrible for the guests for not tacking shower and for else.

A narrow shower room together w

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
During the power outage, this is our 4th hotel. And for the first time, we were charged for the generator fuel, 50k :) 
The room is dirty, the space under the bed hasn't been swept, and the blanket was only ready later because it was "not dry" 
We indeed booked a standard room because it was just for sleeping and charging our phones. So the total is 170, in my personal opinion, it is not worth it (a bit disappointing). 

The bed is noisy (an old-style bed), and the mattress is no longer suitable for a hotel. 

Sorry, I have to be honest :)
comments.originalComment:
Selama mati lampu, ini hotel ke4 kami. Dan baru kali ini kena cas untuk bensin “genset” 50rb :) 
Kamar kotor, bawah kolong dipan tidak di sapu, selimut ready belakangan krna “blm kering” 
Kami memang pesan kamar standar krna hanya untuk menginap dan cas hp. Jd total nya 170, menurut saya pribadi tidak worth it (kaum mendang-mending). 

Dipan berisik (dipan jaman), kasur juga sudah tidak layak untuk hitungan hotel. 

Maafkan harus jujur :)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Hotel Seunia Banda Aceh
